details.request: Implement the focused review follow-up: resolve pending insight placeholder, harden completion gates, add handoff secret scanning to Generator/Validator wrappers, and add retry schema regression validation.

spec.objective: Apply the focused A' follow-up from the review assessment.
success_criteria: Append a resolver entry for INS-20260429-002-01 with the real commit hash.
Strengthen completion gates so SELF_REFERENTIAL placeholders require a resolver and applied_to_doc.commit can be verified against target_doc when possible.
Add secret-pattern scanning for raw handoff payloads in run-generator.mjs and run-validator-a.mjs before sending them to model CLIs.
Add a local wrapper/schema regression check proving generator-input-retry-2.json is accepted by the Generator handoff schema with the retry field.
Update documentation or logs as needed and pass harness audit.

details.summary: Implemented focused review follow-up: resolver-aware insight gate, pre-dispatch handoff secret scan, and retry schema regression validation.

details.notes: One inline node -e test had a PowerShell quoting error and was rerun with corrected quoting; the corrected expected-fail and safe-reference checks passed.

details.next_action: Commit task branch, squash merge to main, push, then record TASK_COMPLETED.

details.outcome: Focused review follow-up hardening completed, validated, squash-merged, and prepared for push.
